constraints: Ran daemon/app/extension validators serially (app cap 1 respected)

commands.command: xcodebuild test -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -only-testing:"OpenBurnBarTests/OpenBurnBarOperatingComposerTests" CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY='' DEVELOPMENT_TEAM=''

xcodebuild test -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -only-testing:"OpenBurnBarTests/OpenBurnBarOperatingComposerTests" CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY='' DEVELOPMENT_TEAM=''

assertionResults.title: Execution-readiness failure reasons propagate consistently to all surfaces
evidenceLines: Daemon transcript lines 49-58 show readiness reason-path tests passed for missing credential, invalid repo/branch, and runtime unavailable.
Daemon transcript lines 68/70/72 show 30 tests executed with 0 failures.
App transcript lines 16426-16469 list VAL_APP_* and VAL_BRIEF_005 tests; no VAL_CROSS_009-tagged readiness propagation test line is present.
Extension transcript lines 8 and 11 show only file-level pass summary (74 tests passed) with no VAL_CROSS_009-tagged readiness propagation evidence line.

Source grep check found BurnBarExecutionReadinessCode defined in OpenBurnBarCore, while AgentLens and extensions/openburnbar had no missing_credential|invalid_repo_branch|runtime_unavailable match in this validation run.
assertionResults.issues: Required cross-surface parity evidence for readiness reason-code mapping (daemon → app → extension messaging) was not demonstrated by app/extension assertion-tagged output in the required command artifacts.

frictions.description: First app validator attempt failed during package dependency resolution (grpc binary artifact fetch).
frictions.resolution: Retried the same xcodebuild command once; second attempt exited 0.

summary: VAL-CROSS-009 failed validation: daemon readiness reason-code tests passed, but required app and extension parity evidence lines for mapped readiness reason codes were not present in the required validator outputs.
